sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85218" key="polupo/deios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῠπόδ-ειος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n85218.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a poulp,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κρέα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.33</biblScope></bibl></cit>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:47" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">47</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πολυπόδειον</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κρέας</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0513.tlg001:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theopomp.Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6</biblScope> </bibl> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πουλ-</etym>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0494.tlg001:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philyll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0476.tlg001:4:43" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mnesim.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.43</biblScope> </bibl> (anap.), etc.</sense> </entryFree>
